channel.title: gripper on Scepter914 Website
channel.description: Recent content in gripper on Scepter914 Website

item.title: 磁石歯車グリッパ”Magripper”による高速グラスピング
item.description: Summary concept 本研究では、バックドライバビリティが高いグリッパ"Magripper"と、リーチングからシームレスに高速グラスピング

item.title: High-speed Hitting Grasping with Magripper
item.description: Summary concept In this study, Magripper, a highly backdrivable gripper, and hitting grasping, high-speed grasping framework, are developed to achieve high-speed hitting grasping executed seamlessly from reaching. The gripper is designed to achieve both high speediness and environmental adaptability. To realize high-speed hitting grasping with Magripper, the framework using three elements were developed. Designed Magripper, a highly backdrivable gripper Implemented deformation control based the Zener model in Magripper Proposed the concept of hitting grasping using Magripper Magripper We introduce a magnetic gear and developed Magripper, a highly backdrivable 1-actuator gripper, to achieve both high speed and environmental adaptability.
